validation_policy.invalid_score_policy: invalid checks must be score_free before they can remain active
validation_policy.unvalidated_disclosure_policy: unvalidated checks require explicit disclosure and further validation; they are not silently trusted
validation_policy.target_definition: Every active score-capable check is cross_domain_validated or validated_with_limits; permanently contextual checks are manual_review_required; no score-capable active check is unvalidated, invalid, or fixture-only.

historical_usage_snapshot.source: read-only aggregate metadata; no domains or customer content

checks.name: 4xx pages present
known_limits: 401 and 403 can represent intentional access control or WAF behavior and remain reviewable context.
429, 408 and pure client/network failures are excluded from deterministic 4xx website findings.

checks.name: 5xx pages present
known_limits: No naturally occurring real-domain 5xx positive case was available; positive 500/502/503/504 and transient cases are controlled fixtures.
A CDN or WAF can emit a confirmed 5xx even when the origin is healthy, so impact attribution remains reviewable.
checks.manual_review_reason: A confirmed CDN or WAF 5xx proves the client response but not the failing infrastructure component or business impact.

missing_evidence: independent confirmation of a naturally occurring server failure
validation_gap.needed_fixture: Positive fixture coverage exists for persistent and transient 500/502/503/504 outcomes.
validation_gap.manual_method: Confirm an organic 5xx with two or three low-rate GET attempts and distinguish CDN/WAF from origin behavior.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: High: an unconfirmed high-impact conclusion can materially distort audit prioritization.

checks.name: Favicon/App icon signals incomplete
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Favicon/App icon signals incomplete can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Article coverage on article-like pages
known_limits: Article schema is not required for ordinary indexing; this Low finding remains an implementation opportunity rather than proof of an indexing defect.
Page-type confidence is conservative; unfamiliar editorial templates can remain insufficient_evidence until targeted review.
Property completeness and rich-result eligibility are outside this presence check.

checks.name: BreadcrumbList missing or low coverage
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: BreadcrumbList missing or low coverage can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Cache-Control header present
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Cache-Control header present can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Canonical missing
known_limits: A required but unstable or technically failed rendered state remains insufficient evidence rather than pass or fail.
Applicability depends on successful indexable HTML and the existing page-type/indexability classification.

checks.name: Canonical non-self
known_limits: A non-self canonical can be intentional for filters, pagination, migrations, language variants or syndication.
Protocol, host and path differences remain observable facts; business equivalence is not inferred automatically.
Historical Run 77 did not retain initial status codes and cannot reconstruct every redirect distinction.
checks.manual_review_reason: URL inequality is measurable, but consolidation intent and content equivalence require publishing, migration and search-intent context.

checks.name: Canonical target non-200 if known
known_limits: No independently observed real-world positive target-status defect was available; positive 308, 404, 410, 500 and non-HTML cases remain fixture validated.
Timeout, redirect-loop and WAF cases must remain insufficient evidence or technical error rather than a website finding.
Legacy runs without initial status and redirect-chain provenance cannot reconstruct whether a canonical target initially redirected.

validation_gap.manual_method: Use curl GET to retain initial status, full redirect chain, final status, final URL and Content-Type for a naturally occurring broken or redirecting canonical target.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: objective mechanics are fixture-covered, but the positive production path has not yet been observed independently.

checks.name: Canonical to other domain
known_limits: A canonical on another registrable domain can be correct for syndication, migration or deliberate consolidation.
A same-registrable-domain subdomain is recorded separately and is not treated as a cross-domain result.
Public-suffix classification establishes host relationship, not publishing intent or content equivalence.
checks.manual_review_reason: The registrable-domain relationship is objective, but intentional syndication and migration cannot be classified as defects without editorial or business context.

checks.name: CDN/cache header signals
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: CDN/cache header signals can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

validation_gap.manual_method: Parse delivered HTML independently and verify scope, positive/negative facts, severity, and repeatability.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: a primary-evidence conclusion remains insufficiently demonstrated on real implementations.

checks.name: Compression header present
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Compression header present can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Consent and tag-manager technical signals
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Consent and tag-manager technical signals can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Console errors present
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
Only one real domain has independent historical validation; the automated facts remain subject to manual contextual interpretation.
checks.manual_review_reason: Console errors present can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Content-Security-Policy present
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Content-Security-Policy present can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

validation_gap.needed_fixture: Add controlled positive and negative fixtures for tech.content_type_html_correct.
validation_gap.manual_method: Parse delivered HTML independently and verify scope, positive/negative facts, severity, and repeatability.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: a primary-evidence conclusion remains insufficiently demonstrated on real implementations.

checks.name: Critical content in raw HTML signal
known_limits: Validation covers targeted raw/render evidence on a finite URL sample; unseen client-side patterns can still require manual review.
Network and browser variation can make an individual render attempt technically non-reproducible.

checks.name: Duplicate meta descriptions
known_limits: Automated facts do not establish search intent, editorial quality or business context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Duplicate effective descriptions are measurable, but business intent, canonical consolidation and snippet usefulness require review.

checks.name: Duplicate titles
known_limits: Automated facts do not establish search intent, editorial quality or business context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Duplicate groups are objective after effective-state, indexability and canonical filtering; whether sameness is harmful depends on page intent and consolidation.

checks.name: Empty alt texts
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
Only one real domain has independent historical validation; the automated facts remain subject to manual contextual interpretation.
checks.manual_review_reason: Empty alt texts can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.manual_review_reason: Favicon signal missing can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: H1 missing
known_limits: Automated facts do not establish search intent, editorial quality or business context.
checks.manual_review_reason: The absence of a visible named h1 is measurable; whether a page lacks a usable primary heading also depends on page type, accessible naming and content design.

checks.name: High TTFB > 800ms
known_limits: Only one real domain has independent historical validation; cross-domain behavior remains unproven.
Historical reconstruction uses stored Run 77 evidence and does not substitute current live state.

missing_evidence: independent positive and negative case pair
validation_gap.manual_method: Parse delivered HTML independently and verify scope, positive/negative facts, severity, and repeatability.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: a primary-evidence conclusion remains insufficiently demonstrated on real implementations.

checks.name: Hreflang x-default missing when hreflang exists
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Hreflang x-default missing when hreflang exists can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: HSTS present
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: HSTS present can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: HTML lang missing
known_limits: The automated check establishes presence or absence only; it does not infer whether the declared language matches the prose.
Invalid-but-present language tags require a separate rule and are not reported as missing.

checks.name: HTML semantic structure summary
known_limits: Automated facts do not establish search intent, editorial quality or business context.
checks.manual_review_reason: The check is an inventory of semantics and accessibility signals; it does not by itself establish an SEO defect.

checks.name: HTTP to HTTPS redirect
known_limits: Root-candidate detection does not by itself prove deep-path and query preservation; the validation batch used separate deep probes.
Temporary 302/307 HTTPS redirects are reported as a warning rather than an outage.

checks.name: HTTP protocol version evidence
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: HTTP protocol version evidence can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: HTTPS reachable
known_limits: Organic validation covers reachable HTTPS sites; certificate mismatch, expiry, DNS and TLS failures use controlled technical fixtures because inaccessible sites cannot provide a normal live audit run.
An HTTPS 4xx or 5xx proves transport reachability but not page health; separate status checks evaluate the HTTP response.

checks.name: Content images without alt
known_limits: Only one real domain has independent historical validation; cross-domain behavior remains unproven.
Historical reconstruction uses stored Run 77 evidence and does not substitute current live state.

missing_evidence: independent positive and negative case pair
validation_gap.manual_method: Validate HTML attributes plus independent resource status, type, bytes, and intrinsic dimensions.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: a primary-evidence conclusion remains insufficiently demonstrated on real implementations.

checks.name: Images without lazy loading
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
Only one real domain has independent historical validation; the automated facts remain subject to manual contextual interpretation.
checks.manual_review_reason: Images without lazy loading can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Images without width/height can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.manual_review_reason: Imported JS/CSS resource performance signals can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

known_limits: Only one real domain has independent historical validation; cross-domain behavior remains unproven.
Historical reconstruction uses stored Run 77 evidence and does not substitute current live state.

missing_evidence: independent positive and negative case pair
validation_gap.manual_method: Parse delivered HTML independently and verify scope, positive/negative facts, severity, and repeatability.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: a primary-evidence conclusion remains insufficiently demonstrated on real implementations.

checks.name: Internal links to 4xx/5xx
known_limits: Only one real domain supplied independently confirmed broken internal-link positives; cross-domain positive behavior remains open.
A URL variant that was not separately requested remains insufficient evidence even if its normalized queue identity matches another authored variant.

validation_gap.needed_fixture: Controlled redirect-to-404, persistent 5xx, asset exclusion and duplicate-occurrence fixtures exist.
validation_gap.manual_method: Independently crawl every internal target with GET and compare occurrence and unique-target totals.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: High: an unconfirmed high-impact conclusion can materially distort audit prioritization.

checks.name: Internal search indexation policy signal
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Internal search indexation policy signal can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Main content likely JS-dependent
known_limits: Validation covers targeted raw/render evidence on a finite URL sample; unseen client-side patterns can still require manual review.
Network and browser variation can make an individual render attempt technically non-reproducible.

checks.name: JSON-LD parse errors
known_limits: No organic real-domain authored JSON-LD syntax error was observed; positive syntax-error validation remains fixture-based.
A browser, response-decoding or extraction failure is technical_error and not a website JSON syntax finding.
A single invalid block alongside valid entities is reported block-locally; impact still needs schema-purpose context.

missing_evidence: organic invalid Article or Product JSON-LD block on a public site
validation_gap.manual_method: Parse delivered JSON-LD independently and compare it with visible content and page type.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: High: an unconfirmed high-impact conclusion can materially distort audit prioritization.

checks.manual_review_reason: Description length is contextual and search-result snippets are dynamically truncated.

checks.manual_review_reason: HTML permits multiple top-level headings in appropriate structures; semantic quality and page outline require contextual review.

checks.manual_review_reason: Organization missing can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Organization sameAs missing
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Organization sameAs missing can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Orphan-like sitemap URLs without internal links
known_limits: A URL without observed inlinks is only an orphan candidate when crawl and link-storage coverage are complete.
Legitimate XML-only, utility, campaign or newly published URLs require manual context.
checks.manual_review_reason: The fact can be measured only with complete discovery and internal-link coverage; whether the URL should receive links remains a site-architecture decision.

checks.name: Permissions-Policy present
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Permissions-Policy present can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Person present/missing
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Person present/missing can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Preconnect missing for external font/CDN origins
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
Only one real domain has independent historical validation; the automated facts remain subject to manual contextual interpretation.
checks.manual_review_reason: Preconnect missing for external font/CDN origins can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Preload missing when resource signals are strong
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Preload missing when resource signals are strong can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Product coverage on product-like pages
known_limits: ProductGroup, IndividualProduct and ProductModel establish Product-family presence but do not by themselves prove Google product rich-result eligibility.
Offer/property completeness is outside this presence check and remains a separate manual or future validated evaluation.
Product configurators, bundles and unfamiliar commerce templates can remain insufficient_evidence when page-type confidence is not high.
Some large commerce sites block automated clients; blocked pages were not treated as website schema failures.

checks.name: Raw H1 missing but rendered H1 present
known_limits: Closed shadow roots and interaction-only headings are outside the settled document snapshot.
The delta is diagnostic and does not mean that the effective page lacks a heading.

missing_evidence: direct positive and negative regression fixture
validation_gap.needed_fixture: Add controlled responses below and above the raw HTML byte threshold.
validation_gap.manual_method: Compare independent raw GET parsing with a real browser/network trace.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: a primary-evidence conclusion remains insufficiently demonstrated on real implementations.

checks.name: Raw internal links much fewer than rendered links
known_limits: Validation covers targeted raw/render evidence on a finite URL sample; unseen client-side patterns can still require manual review.
Network and browser variation can make an individual render attempt technically non-reproducible.

checks.name: Redirect pages present
known_limits: The inventory proves an initial redirect, not that the redirect is harmful.
Redirect quality, chain length and internal-link remediation are evaluated by dedicated checks.

checks.name: Referrer-Policy present
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Referrer-Policy present can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Rendered word count > raw word count * 1.5
known_limits: Validation covers targeted raw/render evidence on a finite URL sample; unseen client-side patterns can still require manual review.
Network and browser variation can make an individual render attempt technically non-reproducible.

checks.name: Resource hint coverage summary
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Resource hint coverage summary can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: robots.txt vorhanden
known_limits: No organic real-domain 200-HTML robots misrepresentation was observed; the actionable positive remains fixture-based.
A single 5xx/429/network observation is availability evidence, not proof of a persistent website defect.
Crawler-specific interpretations can differ at unsupported or non-standard directives.

checks.name: Schema types coverage summary
known_limits: The inventory covers JSON-LD types; Microdata and RDFa remain separate targeted-fact signals and are not merged into this JSON-LD table.
Schema-type presence is inventory only and does not prove validity, visible-content consistency or rich-result eligibility.

checks.name: Sitemap in robots.txt referenziert
known_limits: The check validates discovery syntax only; it does not prove that declared sitemaps are complete or submitted to a search engine.

checks.name: Sitemap vorhanden
known_limits: No organic real-domain invalid 200 XML/HTML soft response or broken declared child was observed; those positives remain fixtures.
Sitemap absence is a score-free opportunity whose relevance depends on site size and discovery architecture.
Large child sitemaps can exceed the targeted validation budget and must remain explicitly partially covered.

checks.name: Sitemap URLs with non-200 status
known_limits: No organic real-domain redirect, 4xx or reproducible 5xx URL listed inside a sitemap was observed; positive status cases remain fixtures.
Real-domain URL probes were deterministic samples, not complete large-corpus validation.
Canonical, noindex and content-quality consistency are separate checks.

missing_evidence: complete real-domain status validation of a non-trivial sitemap corpus
validation_gap.manual_method: Independently parse the full sitemap corpus and GET every unique internal listed URL with bounded retries.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Medium: confirmed fixture failures are reliable, but production precision on organic positive cases is not yet demonstrated.

checks.name: Speakable missing
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Speakable missing can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Status code distribution
known_limits: The distribution covers requested audit URLs and reports initial and final statuses separately; it is not a full-site census.
Pure technical failures are counted separately and are not converted to status zero.

validation_gap.needed_fixture: Initial/final status and technical-error distribution fixtures already exist.
validation_gap.manual_method: Independently reconcile initial and final GET status totals on a second real audit sample.
validation_gap.risk_if_unchanged: Low: diagnostic or optional output may be misleading until independently validated.

checks.name: Synthetic unknown-URL error handling
known_limits: Retry-sensitive 429/500/502/503/504 and network failures use at most two attempts; persistent infrastructure instability can still remain technical evidence rather than a site conclusion.
A WAF can block randomized unknown paths; such a block is technical_error and score-free.

checks.name: Third-party scripts detected
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
Only one real domain has independent historical validation; the automated facts remain subject to manual contextual interpretation.
checks.manual_review_reason: Third-party scripts detected can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Title missing
known_limits: A failed or unstable required render remains insufficient evidence rather than a missing-title finding.
Interaction-only or closed-shadow document titles are outside the settled document snapshot.

checks.name: Title too long > 65
known_limits: Automated facts do not establish search intent, editorial quality or business context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Title length has no universal fixed search-result limit; truncation and title-link rewriting are contextual.

checks.name: Title too short < 20
known_limits: Automated facts do not establish search intent, editorial quality or business context.
checks.manual_review_reason: Title length has no universal fixed search-result limit; intent, branding and rendered result context require review.

checks.name: Too many CSS resources > 15 per page

checks.manual_review_reason: Too many CSS resources > 15 per page can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: www/non-www consistency
known_limits: An intentionally unprovisioned alternate host or an active migration can require operational context.
Root candidates prove root convergence; deep path/query preservation was independently probed but is not yet persisted as a separate production probe.
Genuine subdomain audits are not assigned a fabricated www-of-subdomain requirement.

checks.name: Template canonical pattern issue
known_limits: Template fingerprints are structural approximations; a page-type fallback is weaker than a confirmed template fingerprint.
The threshold requires at least three evaluated and affected URLs, at least 50 percent affected share and at least 80 percent evidence coverage.
Sitewide patterns are emitted only when no qualifying specific template pattern already owns the same issue family.
A repeated non-self or cross-domain pattern can still be intentional and requires business or migration context.
checks.manual_review_reason: The aggregate can prove a repeated homogeneous observation, but whether that pattern is an erroneous template rule requires intent and template-ownership review.

checks.name: Template sample console errors
known_limits: Automated facts do not determine business relevance, search intent, editorial quality, or implementation priority without human context.
Only one real domain has independent historical validation; the automated facts remain subject to manual contextual interpretation.
checks.manual_review_reason: Template sample console errors can collect technical facts automatically, but the conclusion depends on page purpose, search intent, business context, editorial judgment, or implementation trade-offs.

checks.name: Template LCP high
known_limits: Only one real domain has independent historical validation; cross-domain behavior remains unproven.
Historical reconstruction uses stored Run 77 evidence and does not substitute current live state.

Template fallback without a fingerprint is reported separately and remains review-dependent.
